subcodes.first_line: The purpose of the creation of beings hath been the recognition of God—exalted be His glory—that all might attain unto His revealed verses and manifest signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از خلقت خلق مقصود عرفان حق جل جلاله بوده تا کل از آیات منزله و بینات ظاهره
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
